ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the model belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "dataset_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset used for training */,
  "training_duration" REAL /* Duration of model training in hours */,
  "model_status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, inactive, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client associated with the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model associated with these metrics */,
  "fp_rate" REAL /* False positive rate of the model */,
  "fn_rate" REAL /* False negative rate of the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Overall accuracy of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1-score of the model */,
  "mcc" REAL /* Matthews correlation coefficient */,
  "mean_c" REAL /* Mean value of a certain metric */,
  "median_c" REAL /* Median value of a certain metric */,
  "sum_metrics" REAL /* Sum of the metrics */,
  "evaluation_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, project manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model associated with this version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number for the model */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when this version was created */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, inactive, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (if this is a reply) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with this session */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Time when the user logged out */,
  "session_duration" REAL /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model associated with this tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_tags_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with this data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., database, CSV, API) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the data in MB */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the action (e.g., model ID, project ID) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification is for */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the notification was created */,
  "seen" INTEGER /* Whether the user has seen the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the request is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the request */,
  "request_text" TEXT /* Text of the request */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the request was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_requests_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
